word: H63 - אָבֵל הַשִּׁטִּים - ʼÂbêl hash-Shiṭṭîym - aw-bale' hash-shit-teem' - Abelshittim

sections.paragraph:
אבל השּׁטּים - 'âbêl hashshiṭṭı̂ym - aw-bale' hash-shit-teem'

From H58 and the plural of H7848, with the article inserted; meadow of the acacias; Abel hash-Shittim, a place in Palestine: - Abel-shittim.
Cognate: H58, H59, H62, H64, H65, H66, H67
